assertions.description: The Kobold keyboard uses 16 WS2812-compatible addressable LEDs (D1-D16) driven from net RGB_PWM_5V. The analyzer correctly identifies the daisy-chain topology, reports chain_length=16, first_led=D1, last_led=D13, protocol='single-wire (WS2812)', and estimated_current_mA=960 (60mA per LED * 16). This demonstrates the analyzer's addressable LED chain detection works for standard WS2812 part names.
